assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements under IFRS.
The entity is considering a formal designation of foreign currency risk management for an intragroup dividend-related exposure.
A hedging instrument is contemplated or exists.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context provides the IFRS 9 hedge accounting model, including the rules for eligible hedged items in consolidated financial statements and the types of qualifying hedging relationships.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: If hedge accounting is not applied, the context includes the general IFRS 9 model under which gains and losses on financial instruments measured at fair value are recognised in profit or loss.
